name: Multi-turn User Simulation (Sponsor + Ranger)
description: Two user-simulation scenarios (v4 sub-move A4) that exercise the orchestrator's ability to hold context across multiple turns. Mirrors how a Fortune 500 sustainability analyst and a field ranger would actually interact with GUARDIAN.

parts.text: I'm prepping the Q3 audit committee pack. Pull the court-evidence bundle for incident GU-466F7A6FA1F3 — I need the Falsifier verdict, peer acks, and chain hash.

Bundle GU-466F7A6FA1F3 returned: incident_id, species_affected, severity, falsifier_verdict + per-gate diagnostics, four peer acks (park / sponsor / funder / neighbor), chain_hash. Management Review status surfaced if applicable.
On the GU-466F7A6FA1F3 incident — Falsifier dissented. Why? I need this for the audit committee.

Falsifier dissented on GU-466F7A6FA1F3 because the audio_confidence × severity gate failed (0.41 × high). Dispatch proceeded — Falsifier is audit, not block — and the dissent record + per-gate diagnostics are in the court-evidence bundle at /court-evidence/GU-466F7A6FA1F3. Management Review Required workflow stub available.
Ranger PSR-5349 here, en route to Tag-22. Any audio updates since 23:47?
Tag-22 audio since 23:47: vehicle_engine confidence 0.78 at 23:51, distressed_herd 0.83 at 23:53. Suspects likely still in corridor. Forwarding to neighbor_park for east-flank cutoff.
We've got eyes on a vehicle 800m east. Need cross-border ACK from Maasai Mara.
Maasai Mara ACK received, mutual-aid en route to east corridor. Cross-border handoff logged in court-evidence chain.
